CAREERS
CAREERS



Looking to work at a bike shop? At Quick Cranks, we’re passionate about helping all people experience the joys of cycling. When you join our team, you’ll play a big role in strengthening our cycling community and helping others get out and ride! Our team is made up of fun and unique individuals and everyone is welcome to join. We’re looking for motivated and friendly people to fill the open positions.

OPEN POSITIONS:
Customer Service, Sales & Digital Operations

As a Customer Service and Digital Operations team member at Quick Cranks, you will be an essential part of our mission to deliver exceptional customer experiences both in-store and online.



Bicycle Mechanic - Part Time and Full-Time

As a Bicycle Mechanic at Quick Cranks, you will be an essential member of our team, playing a key role in upholding the exceptional and friendly service that forms the backbone of our company.

Apply using the contact us form below with your email and resume!
